summary: Vercel-migration iteration: (A) Local FastAPI regression — 15/15 pytest cases pass (health, enquiries CRUD, admin login/list/stats/patch, blog list+single+404, robots, sitemap, chat SSE via emergentintegrations fallback). Landing page renders in the Emergent preview with no console errors and title 'Avero | Premium Websites in 48 Hours'. (B) `yarn build` in /app/frontend compiles cleanly (226.24 kB gzip main.js). (C) Static audit of new Vercel Serverless files at /app/frontend/api/ — all 12 files pass `node --check`; each exports `default async handler(req, res)`; dynamic routes read params via `req.query.id` and `req.query.slug`; `requireAdmin` correctly parses Bearer header and returns 401/403; Mongo client cached in `global.__averoMongo`; `ensureSeeded()` guards with `seeded` flag and idempotently upserts admin (bcrypt) + blog posts; /api/chat streams via SSE using OpenAI SDK, persists user+assistant messages; /api/enquiries fires Resend email non-blocking. (D) /app/vercel.json and /app/frontend/vercel.json both valid JSON, framework=create-react-app, SPA rewrite regex `/((?!api|.*\..*).*)` correctly excludes /api and dotted paths. (E) /app/DEPLOY.md is Vercel-only with the required 9-var checklist and note that REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL should NOT be set. (F) /app/render.yaml is deleted. No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: chat.js sets `Content-Type: text/event-stream` AFTER the DB insert; if getDb() throws before headers are sent the client gets a partial connection with default headers — consider try/catch around history load returning a JSON 500 instead. Minor, not blocking.
auth.js falls back to JWT_SECRET='change_me' if env var missing — fine for dev but consider hard-failing when NODE_ENV==='production' to prevent silent insecure signing.

db.js sets `seeded = false` inside the catch to allow retry, but a partial failure (e.g. admin seeded but blog upsert failed) will re-insert admin lookups on next call — findOne guards this so it stays idempotent, good.
enquiries.js relies on `crypto.randomUUID()` which is available on Node 18+ globals in Vercel — confirmed OK for Vercel Node 20 runtime.

/api/chat has no OPENAI_API_KEY on Emergent env — the Vercel function returns 503 as designed; local flow correctly uses FastAPI's emergentintegrations fallback which the frontend hits via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vercel serverless files cannot be executed here (no Vercel req/res shim); only static verification via `node --check` and code inspection was performed — all 12 files parse. Actual runtime testing must happen post-deploy on Vercel. Local Emergent env still runs the FastAPI backend at /app/backend which the frontend consumes via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL; that flow is fully regression-tested and green.
